progress_summary: 10x audit pass over skills/ + .claude/skills/ communication, checkpoint semantics, and bug-check invocation. 11 findings: 2 CRITICAL, 3 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM, 2 LOW. Root cause of 'bug-check never runs': git-ops/SKILL.md has its own inline pre-commit checks that warn-don't-block and never invoke bug-check, the orchestrator.md handoff table is aspirational not enforced, and there is no PreToolUse(Bash:git commit*) hook to gate raw commits. Secondary critical issue: .claude/skills/ has drifted from skills/ — three SKILL.md files (checkpoint-protocol, git-ops, orchestrator) are stale Apr-25 copies. The runtime loads the stale ones.

progress_table.label: Pass 7: pipeline map vs SKILL.md realities
Pass 9: orchestrator descriptions vs runtime skill list

key_decisions: Treating .claude/skills/ as a deployment artifact of skills/ — drift means the runtime is running stale instructions
bug-check non-invocation is multi-cause: missing wiring in git-ops, no PreToolUse hook, Stop hook only fires post-hoc
Two checkpoint write paths (.sh per-skill vs .mjs at root) disagree on validation; the Stop hook recommends the unvalidated path

next_actions: Apply F-001 fix: replace .claude/skills/ with symlinks to skills/ OR add a sync script + CI guard
Apply F-002 fix: rewrite skills/git-ops/SKILL.md sections 'Pre-Commit Checks' (~L219) and '/git-sync step 6' to actively invoke bug-check and BLOCK on FAIL
Apply F-003 fix: add PreToolUse hook in .claude/settings.json that gates Bash matching '^git commit' on a fresh PASS verdict in .checkpoints/bug-check.checkpoint.json
Apply F-004 fix: change checkpoint-hygiene.sh error message to recommend `node scripts/checkpoint.mjs update`, deprecate the per-skill .sh writers
Apply F-006 fix: add deploy-ops → security-auditor and deploy-ops → monitoring-ops chain instructions in skills/deploy-ops/SKILL.md
